title: relay/Cargo.toml: promote rand from dev to production dependency
description:
What: Move rand from [dev-dependencies] to [dependencies] in relay/Cargo.toml so jitter code in the write task can call rand::random::<u64>() in production builds.

Algorithm:
1. Open relay/Cargo.toml
2. Find the line rand = { workspace = true } (or similar) under [dev-dependencies]
3. Add rand.workspace = true under [dependencies] (before dev-dependencies)
4. Run cargo build -p nie-relay to confirm it compiles
5. Run cargo test --workspace to confirm tests still pass

Defensive rules:
- Do not change the version — use workspace = true to inherit from root Cargo.toml
- Do not remove from dev-dependencies if other dev-only code uses it (check with grep)

Team: standard R+I+T
acceptance_criteria: cargo build -p nie-relay passes; cargo test --workspace passes; rand appears in [dependencies] section of relay/Cargo.toml
